footer.copyright: © {year} Ilm Learning Center. All rights reserved.

hero.label: Tutoring Centre — Palestine
hero.headline: Unlock Your Full Academic Potential
hero.subheadline: Expert tutoring for GCSE, A-Level, IB, and Tawjihi students. Personalised sessions built around each student's goals.

programs.pageIntro: We offer expert tutoring across the most widely studied curricula in Palestine. Whether you're preparing for international examinations or the national Tawjihi, our tutors are subject specialists who know the syllabus inside out.

gcse.name: GCSE
gcse.shortDesc: Core and extended subjects for Year 10–11 students
gcse.longDesc: Our GCSE programme supports Year 10 and 11 students sitting Cambridge IGCSE and Edexcel GCSE examinations. We cover all core and extended subjects with a focus on exam technique and conceptual clarity.

alevel.name: A-Level
alevel.longDesc: For students in Years 12 and 13 preparing for A-Level examinations. Our tutors specialise in the subjects most commonly required for university admissions, with structured revision plans and past paper practice.

ib.name: IB
ib.shortDesc: Higher and Standard Level across all IB groups
ib.longDesc: We support IB Diploma students across Higher and Standard Level subjects. Sessions cover the full IB syllabus including Internal Assessments, Extended Essays, and exam preparation.

tawjihi.name: Tawjihi
tawjihi.shortDesc: Full support for the Palestinian national curriculum
tawjihi.longDesc: Complete preparation for the Palestinian General Secondary Education Certificate (Tawjihi). We cover all branches — Scientific, Literary, and Commercial — with tutors who understand the Ministry of Education curriculum.

programs.tawjihiBranches: All Tawjihi branches covered — Scientific, Literary, and Commercial
programs.ctaText: Get in touch — we'll find the right tutor.

specialists.title: Subject Specialists
specialists.desc: Our tutors teach only their area of expertise — not generalists covering everything.

tawjihi.title: Covers Tawjihi
tawjihi.desc: One of few centres supporting the Palestinian curriculum alongside international qualifications.

tailored.title: Built Around You
tailored.desc: Every session is tailored to the individual student's gaps, not a generic syllabus run-through.

testimonials.title: What Students Say
testimonials.quote1: My A-Level Chemistry grade jumped from a D to a B after just two months of sessions. The explanations actually made sense.
testimonials.quote2: I was struggling badly with Tawjihi Maths but my tutor helped me understand the patterns. I passed with distinction.

ctaBanner.heading: Ready to start?
ctaBanner.subtext: Get in touch and we'll match you with the right tutor.

about.story1: Ilm Learning Center was founded in Palestine with one goal: to give every student access to the kind of expert, focused tutoring that makes the difference between struggling and succeeding. Ilm (علم) means knowledge in Arabic — it's not just our name, it's our purpose.
about.story2: We work with students preparing for GCSE, A-Level, IB, and Tawjihi examinations, offering personalised one-to-one sessions that are built around each student's specific needs, not a generic programme.

excellence.title: Excellence
excellence.desc: We hold our tutors to high standards and our students to even higher ones. Good enough is never the goal.

personalisation.title: Personalisation
personalisation.desc: No two students are the same. We don't run classes — we build individual learning plans.

community.title: Community
community.desc: We're Palestinian educators serving Palestinian students. This isn't just a service, it's a commitment.

contact.name: Full Name
contact.subject: Subject of Interest
contact.success: Thank you — we'll be in touch within 24 hours.
contact.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.
contact.rateLimited: Too many messages sent. Please try again later.

admin.title: Ilm Admin
admin.welcome: Welcome back. Choose a section to manage.
admin.manageTeachersDesc: Add, edit, or remove tutors displayed on the public website.
admin.managePlansDesc: Configure pricing plans, features, and billing periods.
